country_attribution: multi (b): a video is counted in every country whose search surfaced it; no per-country ranking (unreliable)

top_videos_by_views.title: Mbappé Poured Water Every Time… Except When It Was Needed 💧😑 #parody #football #haaland #worldcup
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This surreal parody featuring France has sparked a mix of amusement and criticism regarding its AI-generated content. Trending across several Spanish-speaking countries, viewers are debating the quality and nature of the AI technology used.
top_videos_by_views.narration_ja: フランス代表を扱ったこのシュールなパロディ動画は、AI技術に対する驚きと批判が入り混じり、スペイン語圏の国々で注目を集めました。

top_videos_by_views.title: Isidor and a golazo that Haiti will remember forever. 🇭🇹👏 #FIFAWorldCupOnYT
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: Fans are celebrating Morocco's victory over Haiti in this FIFA World Cup match, with particular praise for Isidor's impressive goal. The video trended globally with high sentiment, highlighting both skillful play and defensive lapses.
top_videos_by_views.narration_ja: FIFAワールドカップでのモロッコ対ハイチ戦を収めたこの動画は、イシドールの見事なゴールが称賛され、世界中で高い評価を得ています。

top_videos_by_views.title: ملخص مباراة المغرب وهايتي | دور المجموعات - كأس العالم FIFA 2026™
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This highlight reel of Morocco's 4-2 win over Haiti has garnered massive support and pride across the Arab world. Comments reflect solidarity and high hopes for Morocco’s performance in the 2026 World Cup.
top_videos_by_views.narration_ja: モロッコがハイチに4-2で勝利した試合のハイライトは、アラブ諸国から大きな誇りと称賛のコメントを集め、大会への期待が高まっています。

top_videos_by_views.title: Ronaldo x Yamal Skills🤣🔥
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This edited skills video featuring Ronaldo and Yamal has caused confusion among viewers in Spanish-speaking regions. Many comments point out the misleading nature of the content and errors in player identification.
top_videos_by_views.narration_ja: ロナウドとヤマルを編集したこのスキル動画は、内容の誤りや選手識別の間違いが多く、スペイン語圏の視聴者の間で困惑を招いています。

top_videos_by_views.title: ملخص مباراة اسكتلندا والبرازيل | دور المجموعات - كأس العالم FIFA 2026™
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: A summary of Brazil's victory over Scotland has been met with enthusiasm across Arab-speaking nations. The video highlights Vinícius Júnior’s performance and Neymar's return to the pitch.
top_videos_by_views.narration_ja: ブラジルがスコットランドに勝利した試合のまとめ動画で、ヴィニシウス・ジュニオールの活躍とネイマールの復帰がアラブ諸国の視聴者から大きな注目を集めています。

top_videos_by_views.title: Her Aura ☠️ #shorts #fifa #football #women
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This AI-generated short featuring a stylish bicycle kick has sparked discussion in Turkey and Uzbekistan. Viewers are divided, expressing both awe at the skill and skepticism toward the artificial nature of the video.
top_videos_by_views.narration_ja: ヒールでオーバーヘッドキックを決めるAI生成ショート動画が、トルコやウズベキスタンで議論を呼んでいます。技術への驚きとAI特有の不自然さへの懐疑的な意見が寄せられています。

top_videos_by_views.title: Ronaldinho Gaúcho comprimenta todos os jogadores da Seleção #futebol #football #loucosporfutebol
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: Ronaldinho’s interaction with players in this video has triggered widespread nostalgia and admiration. Trending in Brazil and Portugal, the content is praised for highlighting the legend’s humble personality.
top_videos_by_views.narration_ja: ロナウジーニョが選手たちと交流するこの動画は、ブラジルやポルトガルで大きな懐かしさと称賛を呼び、彼の謙虚な人柄が評価されています。

top_videos_by_views.title: BRASIL X ESCÓCIA - COPA DO MUNDO 2026 - FUTEBOL (PRÉ JOGO) - NEYMAR JR
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This live pre-match coverage of Brazil versus Scotland drew global interest, particularly among Portuguese speakers. Fans expressed strong support for the national team and excitement regarding Neymar and Vinícius Júnior.
top_videos_by_views.narration_ja: ブラジル対スコットランド戦のライブ配信は、ポルトガル語圏を中心に世界中で注目を集めました。視聴者はブラジル代表への応援やネイマールらの活躍に対する期待を寄せています。

top_videos_by_views.title: 홍명보 레드카드 줘버리는 김영광!! #남아공전 #축구 #월드컵
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: South Korean fans are expressing intense frustration with the national team following their loss to South Africa. The discussion centers on demands for management changes and criticism of recent tactical performances.
top_videos_by_views.narration_ja: 南アフリカ戦での敗北を受け、韓国のサッカーファンからはチーム運営に対する厳しい批判や監督交代を求める声が強く上がっています。

top_videos_by_views.title: Vamos México. 🇲🇽 #socceranalysis #tiktokcampaign #mexico #worldcup #fifaworldcup2026 #football
top_videos_by_views.narration_en: This World Cup-themed video has sparked mixed reactions, with viewers debating team allegiances and pointing out visual inconsistencies. The content has seen engagement across a wide range of international regions.
top_videos_by_views.narration_ja: ワールドカップをテーマにしたこの動画は、視聴者の間で応援するチームに関する議論や、映像の違和感についての指摘が相次ぎ、多くの国で視聴されています。
